headline: Retirement portfolios need fixed income playbook reset
summary: If you retired in 2023 or 2024, your money market fund delivered yields above 5% on virtually no risk, according to CNBC. Millions of retirees responded by parking record sums in cash, treating short-term instruments as a complete income strategy. That approach worked in a specific rate ...

headline: BlackRock Isn't Just an ETF Giant Anymore. Its Private Markets Pivot Is the Real Growth Story Now.
summary: BlackRock is making an important shift, and it comes along with higher margins.
